svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Account Factory Architecture" id="account-factory"> <mxGraphModel dx="-714" dy="-254" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user-engineer" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.user;" value="Platform Engineer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="30" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="810" width="1220" x="130" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mgmt-label" parent="aws-cloud" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=4;spacingRight=4;overflow=hidden;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];rotatable=0;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Management Account" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="220" x="20" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="Region (ap-northeast-1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="1180" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sc-portfolio" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.service_catalog;" value="Service Catalog
Portfolio
(Account Factory)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sc-product" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.service_catalog;" value="Service Catalog
Product
(Vending Machine)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="260" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sc-launch-role" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.role;" value="IAM Launch Role
(SC Launch)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="60" x="260" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-provision" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda
AccountProvisioning
(Python 3.12, 512MB)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-status" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" value="Lambda
StatusCheck
(Python 3.12, 256MB)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="480" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda-role" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.role;" value="IAM Role
(Least Privilege)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="60" x="480" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eventbridge" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.eventbridge;" value="EventBridge Rule
(rate: 5 minutes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="260" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamodb" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB
Account Metadata
(PAY_PER_REQUEST, PITR, SSE)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3-templates" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" value="S3 Bucket
CFn Templates
(AES256, Versioning)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sns-topic" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.sns;" value="SNS Topic
Provisioning
Notifications (KMS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kms-key" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.key_management_service;" value="KMS Key
(Log Encryption
Auto Rotation)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="960" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw-logs" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#759C3E;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch Logs
/aws/account-factory
(30 days, KMS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="720" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw-alarm" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#759C3E;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_alarm;" value="CloudWatch
Dashboard & Alarm
(Provisioning Errors)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="960" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="organizations" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.organizations;" value="AWS Organizations
(Multi-Account)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="960" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new-account" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="New AWS Account
(Provisioned)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="1080" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cfn-stackset" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudformation;" value="CloudFormation
StackSet
(Account Baseline)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="960" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-sc-product" edge="1" parent="region" source="sc-portfolio" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#E7157B;fontSize=11;" target="sc-product" value="Contains"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-launch-role-product" edge="1" parent="region" source="sc-launch-role" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DD344C;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="sc-product" value="Launch Constraint"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-product-lambda" edge="1" parent="region" source="sc-product" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="lambda-provision" value="Invoke"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-sc-s3" edge="1" parent="region" source="sc-product" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#7AA116;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="s3-templates" value="Load Template"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-iam-provision" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-role" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DD344C;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="lambda-provision" value="Attached"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-iam-status" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-role" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DD344C;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="lambda-status" value="Attached"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-orgs" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-provision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="organizations" value="CreateAccount"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-ddb" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-provision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="dynamodb" value="PutItem
(metadata)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-sns" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-provision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="sns-topic" value="Publish
(notification)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-stackset" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-provision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="cfn-stackset" value="CreateStackInstances"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-eb-status" edge="1" parent="region" source="eventbridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#E7157B;fontSize=11;" target="lambda-status" value="Trigger (5 min)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-status-orgs" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-status" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="organizations" value="DescribeAccountStatus"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-status-ddb" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-status" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="dynamodb" value="UpdateItem
(status)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-status-sns" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-status" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="sns-topic" value="Publish
(completed)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-orgs-account" edge="1" parent="region" source="organizations" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#0066CC;fontSize=11;" target="new-account" value="Provisions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-stackset-account" edge="1" parent="region" source="cfn-stackset" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#E7157B;fontSize=11;" target="new-account" value="Apply Baseline"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-cw" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-provision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#759C3E;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cw-logs" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-kms-cw" edge="1" parent="region" source="kms-key" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#DD344C;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cw-logs" value="Encrypt Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-alarm-sns" edge="1" parent="region" source="cw-alarm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#759C3E;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="sns-topic" value="Alert on Error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-cw-alarm" edge="1" parent="region" source="cw-logs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#759C3E;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="cw-alarm" value="Monitor"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note-arch" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Architecture Highlights:
- Service Catalog で自己サービス型アカウント発行
- Organizations.CreateAccount → Lambda で自動化
- EventBridge で 5 分ごとにステータスポーリング
- DynamoDB でアカウントメタデータ永続化
- S3 に CFn テンプレートを格納（暗号化 + バージョニング）
- SNS で完了/エラー通知
- KMS でログ暗号化（自動ローテーション）
- CloudWatch でエラーアラーム + ダッシュボード" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="440" x="60" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-user-sc" edge="1" parent="1" source="user-engineer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="sc-portfolio" value="Provision Request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Architecture Highlights:
- Service Catalog で自己サービス型アカウント発行
- Organizations.CreateAccount → Lambda で自動化
- EventBridge で 5 分ごとにステータスポーリング
- DynamoDB でアカウントメタデータ永続化
- S3 に CFn テンプレートを格納（暗号化 + バージョニング）
- SNS で完了/エラー通知
- KMS でログ暗号化（自動ローテーション）
- CloudWatch でエラーアラーム + ダッシュボード
